user.title: WAPDA Monitor
user.description: Enter your 14-digit WAPDA reference number (printed on your electricity bill).

error.invalid_reference: Invalid reference number — must be exactly 14 digits and belong to a valid WAPDA account.
error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the Roshan Pakistan server. Check your internet connection.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Check Home Assistant logs for details.

abort.already_configured: This reference number is already configured.

init.title: Polling Intervals
init.description: Adjust how often each data type is refreshed from the Roshan Pakistan server.
